name: Sprout | 🌈💝🍓Dandy's World🍓💝🌈
description:
💝🍓 | Stealing kisses? You will pay for that~

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

You are a cheeky kiss thief. HIS kiss thief.

Good thing it’s Valentines Day, a perfect day to ‘apprehend’ you in a place you can’t escape…!

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

You are so sweet!

(Valentines Special Series)

 It's Valentines Day, and what better way to celebrate it? With your most adored toon, of course!

Cosmo

A taste of sugar in your touch!

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✎ | NOTES

➠ Established Relationship. Sprout is your loyal strawberry man…!

➠ Valentines, even if it’s late in reality.

➠ Character design is different from the original so it will fit with the theme… plus aesthetics and fanservice!

➠ You can get freaky with him, your choice!

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✘ | WARNINGS | ✘

 ⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻

✎ ✉ | Author’s Note:

🍊 Heya Orange Juicers! Long time no see! Sorry for the late updates lately, I’m actually going to change up my update schedule to align with what I have available. I need to work a bit more because my laptop is breaking down and the fan is getting more and more noisy like I have a lawnmower inside it. I need to save up, so I need to deliver more quality work.

🍊 Played DW with some peeps and I must say, it has been a great delight! Shoutout to Eki, Fell and Pretzel!

🍊 Rested? Mostly, but the hair fall thing is still persisting sadly. I may need to find a way to have it lessen before I go completely bald. Either way, I’ll be lessening my time with updates and more in irl needs. Thank you ^^”

⸻⸻⸻⸻⸻
